title: What Is The Best Definition Of Bloodborne Pathogens
source_filename: What Is The Best Definition Of Bloodborne Pathogens.docx

qas.q: HIV is transmitted when _____________ of an infected person comes into contact with the blood or mucous membrane of a healthy person.
T or F: the only way bloodborne pathogens are spread is through direct contact with contaminated blood.
What kind of PPE should be part of all first aid kits?

qas.a: Protect healthcare workers and residents from risk of disease

qas.q: T or F: Handwashing is the single best defense against the spread of disease.
A vaccine is available for which bloodborne pathogen?
What is the best definition of "bloodborne pathogens"?
qas.a: Germs that are carried through blood and other bodily fluids

qas.q: What is the best definition of standard precautions?
qas.a: Required practices to protect from bloodborne pathogens

qas.q: According to the CDC, how long should healthcare workers wash their hands?
